text:
私の目に狂いはなかったみたい。
最高のお肉ね！

陸生の生物に負けない
高タンパクな食材を見つけたわ。

<%me>さん
これを捕まえるのは
大変だったんじゃない？

またお願いするかもしれないけど
そのときはよろしく

See? I just knew it.
This looks like the perfect meat!

This is packed with the sort of protein you
might expect from a more terrestrial sort of
creature.

This was probably pretty tough to catch, wasn't
it, <%me>?

I sure hope you don't mind if I ask you to do
so for me again sometime!
